kept.text:
This is like the brainrot of doomscrolling tikok except on steroids

TV ruined brains slightly
Netflix made it a bit worse
Social media made it a bit worse
Extremely short form content made it even worse

AI is getting smarter and humans are getting dumber

gg we had a good run

quoted_tweet.text:
I'm 22 years old and Claude Code is deteriorating my brain.

Every single day for the last 6 months I've had 6 to 8 Claude Code terminals open, waiting for a response just so I can hit 'enter' 75% of the time. And it's doing something to me.

In convos with a couple of friends, it's been a point that's been brought up pretty frequently.

None of us feel as sharp as we used to.

I don't know if it's just us, or others in their 20s are feeling the same thing, but it's something I've been thinking about a lot.

P.S. I know this is a problem with my reliability/usage of it, not Claude Code itself, but the effects are real nonetheless

kept.text:
┏━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
クリエイティブディレクター haru.の #ネトフリこれ見て
┗━━━━━━━━━━━━┛

◆告白の代価
『自分の“決めつけ”が浮き彫りになってつらい。けど、止められない！』

夫殺しの容疑をかけられながらも、鮮やかでお洒落な装いを貫くユンス。そこに違和感を抱いてしまうことに動揺…！エピソードを追うごとに、自分の内にある“決めつけ“が浮き彫りになってつらい。けど、止められない！雨が降るグラウンドで踊るモウンとユンスが視線を交わすシーンは、静かながらもパワフルでとても印象的です。正しさを超えた女性たちの多様な連帯も見どころ。

◆haru.（クリエイティブディレクター）
東京藝術大学在学中にインディペンデント雑誌『HIGH(er)magazine』を創刊。2019年に株式会社HUGを設立し、クリエイティブディレクターとして「羊文学」のアートワークを手がけるほか、Podcast番組「take me high(er)」、「月曜、朝のさかだち by ORBIS」のパーソナリティを務める。

#ゴールデデーンウィーク

You’ll be able to scroll through clips from movies and shows, all tailored to your interests. 

It’s designed to help users discover what to watch faster.

The update is now live in the US, UK, Australia, Canada, India, Malaysia, Pakistan, the Philippines and South Africa, and will roll out to the rest of the world in the months to come.
